name: Text content swap on hero headline
notes: Hardcoded text inside a Vue component template (no {{ }} interpolation). Empirical observation (deployed lab, prod build): SURVIVES without reinforcement — Vue's hydration walks the DOM and accepts static text as-rendered without reconciling against an expected vNode value. The guidance treated text edits as 'safe with data-allow-mismatch'; the empirical reality is that static-template text is safe even without that attribute. Reinforcement layer remains a defensive belt-and-suspenders.

ops.value: Edge-applied variation. Same Vue 3.5 SSR page underneath.
